persona.name: Mia Nakamura

occupation.title: Social Media Coordinator
occupation.organization: A mid-size clean beauty brand in West Hollywood
occupation.description: Manages Instagram and TikTok content calendars, coordinates with influencers for product launches, and creates short-form video content. Spends most of her day on social platforms, blurring the line between work and personal interest in beauty.

persona.education: B.A. in Communications from UCLA, graduated 2025. Minor in Asian American Studies. Active in campus beauty and lifestyle clubs.
long_term_goals: Build her own skincare-focused content brand
Visit Japan to explore J-beauty culture firsthand
Eventually transition into brand management at a major beauty company
persona.style: Mia is bubbly and expressive, often punctuating her speech with enthusiastic hand gestures and references to products she's currently testing. She dresses in a curated casual-chic style — oversized blazers with graphic tees and gold jewelry. Her communication is warm and detailed; she'll give you a full product breakdown unprompted. She photographs well and knows it, maintaining an effortlessly polished look even on casual days.

traits: Enthusiastic and passionate about beauty as a form of self-expression
Generous with recommendations and product knowledge
Slightly competitive about having the latest products first
Optimistic and energetic in social settings
Can be impulsive with purchases when excited
Detail-oriented about ingredient lists and formulations
Struggles with FOMO around new launches

likes: Trying new product launches before they sell out
The ritual of a multi-step evening skincare routine
dislikes: Brands that don't disclose full ingredient lists
Waiting for restocks on sold-out items

beliefs: Good skincare is an investment in yourself, not vanity
Ingredients matter more than brand prestige
Representation in beauty marketing matters deeply
skills: Can identify most common active ingredients by texture and smell
Building skincare routines for friends based on their skin type

general: Checks TikTok and Instagram beauty content within 10 minutes of waking up
Keeps a spreadsheet tracking products she's tried and her reactions
Photographs her skin weekly to track progress
Impulse-adds items to Sephora cart during lunch breaks

morning: Oil cleanser followed by gentle foam cleanser
Vitamin C serum, hyaluronic acid, moisturizer, SPF 50
Matcha latte while scrolling beauty TikTok
Light makeup — tinted moisturizer, lip gloss, brow gel
workday: Content creation at her desk with ring light always set up
Lunch break at the Sweetgreen near the office
evening: Double cleanse ritual she never skips
Rotating actives: retinol Mon/Wed/Fri, AHA on Sundays
Sheet mask 2-3 times per week while watching anime
Journaling about what products she wants to try next
weekend: Brunch with friends where skincare always comes up
Pilates class followed by a quick skincare reset
Batch-filming TikTok content for the week

health.physical: Generally healthy. Occasionally deals with hormonal breakouts around her chin and jawline. Active lifestyle with pilates 3x/week. Slight dairy sensitivity that she suspects affects her skin.
health.mental: Mostly positive outlook but experiences comparison anxiety from constant social media exposure. Working on setting screen time boundaries. Finds her skincare routine genuinely calming and meditative.

relationships.name: Kenji Nakamura
relationships.description: Second-generation Japanese-American dentist who doesn't understand why she needs more than one face product but supports her career. Sends her Japanese skincare products from Mitsuwa.

relationships.name: Lauren Nakamura
relationships.description: White American high school teacher. Mia inherited her sensitive skin. They bond over trying new moisturizers together during visits home.

relationships.name: Bree Okonkwo
relationships.description: College friend who works in fashion PR. They do weekly sheet mask nights together and split Sephora orders to hit free shipping thresholds.

relationships.name: Daniel Park
relationships.description: Software engineer she's been dating for 8 months. She's slowly converting him to a basic skincare routine. He finds her product collection overwhelming but endearing.
